text: Father says I should mind the stall, but I keep thinking about Veneficturis—about the Test of Fire they talk about in the market whispers.
speaker: Telvar

text: Myramar tells me patience is a kind of spell. I am Red rank if I am anything yet, and the city feels bigger than every map in Secundus.
speaker: Telvar

text: Twelve districts, and each one tries to teach you something different. I wonder which lesson will burn when the real trial comes.
speaker: Telvar
